description:
**Milestone:** Phase 3: Framework Adapters

Add framework-specific sections to Starlight docs: React, Vue, Angular installation guides, SSR/SSG compatibility for Next.js, Nuxt, Astro, SvelteKit. Framework-specific Storybook showing React wrappers.

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/docs/src/content/docs/frameworks/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] React section with Next.js examples
- [ ] Vue section with Nuxt examples
- [ ] Angular section with setup guide
- [ ] SSR/SSG compatibility matrix
- [ ] Common gotchas and workarounds
- [ ] Framework-specific Storybook integration

**Complexity:** medium
title: Framework-specific documentation and SSR compatibility guide
